title: matricaria breviradiata
intro: Matricaria breviradiata, also known as dwarf chamomile or short-rayed chamomile, is a small, annual herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to soothe skin irritations and calm digestive issues. The health benefits of Matricaria breviradiata include reducing anxiety and promoting better sleep, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. Matricaria breviradiata can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations, including topical applications for skin conditions.
